_meta.description: GX10 Auto Boot Orchestrator — sequenced startup for the 7 core services after reboot/crash
_meta.note: This file does NOT duplicate start_command strings. Every entry below calls './agentia.sh start <name>', which reads the real command straight from agentia.json. If you ever edit a start_command in agentia.json, this file needs no changes.

boot_sequence.name: qwen36-vllm
boot_sequence.note: Primary model (per agentia.json _meta.primary_model). Orchestrator BLOCKS here, polling port 45672, for up to 10 min before moving on. Everything else depends on this being up.

boot_sequence.name: hermes
boot_sequence.note: Started 2 min after Qwen3.6 is confirmed ready, since Hermes agent talks to Qwen3.6 on 45672.

boot_sequence.name: odysseus
boot_sequence.note: Last step in the sequence — no trailing wait needed.

boot_sequence.name: hermes
boot_sequence.note: Second pass safety net in case Hermes died between step 2 and the end of the boot sequence.

crash_watchdog.note: The watchdog action checks only these 7 services (independent of the always_on flags inside agentia.json). If one is down it restarts ONLY that one via its own start_via command. It never re-runs the full staged sequence on a crash, so a Hermes crash doesn't force a fresh 10-minute Qwen3.6 wait.
